titleStmt.title: SII 11.94: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 94. (B.K. No. 72 of 1927-28). DAṀBAḶ, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB FIXED OVER A GUTTER NEAR THE OLD chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This inscription is in Kannaḍa and belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I). It registers a gift of gold made to the Nagara-Jinālaya at Dharmavoḻal (i.e. modern Daṁbaḷ) by Bīrayya-Seṭṭi, the son-in-law of Bāchayya-Seṭṭi in the presence of the Mahānagara of the Sixteen Seṭṭis.
The record is dated Śaka 981, Vikārin, Chaitra, śuddha 13, Sunday = A.D. 1059, March 28, Sunday; f.d.t. ·71.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© bhaddramastu jinaśāsanāya . svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ
śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraparamabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷō
kyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābivṛ(r)ddhipravarddhamā
na mācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . samastaguṇasampannaṁ
samyaktaratnākaraṁ jinapādapaṁkajabhravaraṁ śīmat bācayya
seṭṭiya raḷiyaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ bīrayyaseṭṭiyar dharmmavoḻala
nagarajināḷayakke padinaruvarsseṭṭiyara mahānagarada sa
mudāyada saṁnnidhānado ḷāhāradānakke . sakavarṣa 981 neya
vikāri saṁvatsarada caitrasuddha trayōdasi Ādityavāra
da(ṁ)ndu koṭṭhamokkeya posavoṅgadyāṇa 35 . Ī po(ṁ)nna śrā
vakasamūhamiḻdu kaḷāntaradoḷ naḍeyisuvar . Intī dharmmama na
ḍeyisida mahāpuruṣarge tīrtthastānada mahādhvajamettida phaḷamakku .
Idanaḷidaṁ maṁgapaṭṭeyo ḷaynūrvvaru riśiyara naḷida mahāpā
takanakkuṁ . © dēśakālasthitiyiṁ dānamaṁ taṟisi
doḍīyartthaṁ nagarajinālaya doḍave .
Digital edition of SII 11.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
